case_title: VIKING SERVICES CORPORATION, VS. NILES DUNN ET AL

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VIKING SERVICES CORPORATION, DOING BUSINESS AS WEST COAST PROPERTY MANAGEMENT COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DUNN, NILES AN INDIVIDUAL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1670 MARKET STREET, UNIT NUMBER 47 CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94102, LEASE FORFEITED, ** JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY AND NAMED CLAIMANTS IF ANY ** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 69170295)

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 69170295), PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF VIKING SERVICES CORPORATION, DOING BUSINESS AS WEST COAST PROPERTY MANAGEMENT COMPANY SERVED JAN-22-2023, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 THROUGH 10, INCLUSIVE
